articles.title: Long-delayed defence spending plan to be published, with focus on drone warfare
articles.description: The defence investment plan will set out how billions will be spent on equipping the UK Armed Forces.

articles.title: Chris Mason: Burnham revels on public stage but has little time to hammer ideas into shape
articles.description: As a man who has held prime ministerial ambitions for years, Andy Burnham makes his dash for the door, political editor Chris Mason writes.

articles.title: 'Left on your own': Angry Venezuelans accuse government of negligence and apathy
articles.description: People in areas devastated by twin earthquakes say they need more support from the government.

articles.title: Refugees will be told to repay around £10,000 under new asylum rules
articles.description: Ministers will be given powers to recover costs from adults who have received asylum support under new laws.
